prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年西北大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约4644名、4773名、5718名、6127名、5469名。2021至2024年呈持续后移趋势（累计后移约1483名）， 2025年出现明显回升（较2024年前移约658名），近两年波动幅度约658–571名，2025年基准位次约5469名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为30 人，2024年增至40人，2025年增至55人，2026年进一步扩至80人，较2025年增加25人（增幅约45.5%），连续三年大幅扩招，竞争压力显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第70名（2026年），近年排名稳定在64–70名区间，属中上游211院校，综合实力较强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅论文抄袭事件，学校已启动调查，对报考热度有一定抑制；抖音综合热度排名第81位（评价为一般），短视 频平台曝光量中等偏低，未见明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中未出现该校断档或暴跌信号；第五轮学科评估中，地质学获评A、考古学获评A、软件 工程获评A-，三个A类学科在211院校中表现突出；考古学为该校王牌专业，与招生专业中的考古学（数智考古创新实验班）直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数 据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校计算机类、电子信息类、物理学类等招生专业高度相关，可能提升相关专业组报考热度；海南省 考生总数从2021年约5.3万持续增长至2025年约6.7万，2026年预计约7.8万（+15.7%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争，波动极小；西北大学位于陕西西安，属跨省招生，在海南省无本地招生倾斜；该校在海南招生占比极小（约0.3%–0.5%），地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 基准位次5469名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招45.5%（竞争缓解，推高位次数字增大）、海南省考生总数增长约15.7%（竞争加剧，推高位次数字减小）以及声誉偏负面（抑制报考热 度，推高位次数字增大）等多重因素，扩招幅度远超考生增幅，净效应为竞争明显缓解，叠加声誉负面信号，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移；预测最低位次约6990名 ，区间6490–7490名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6990名，区间6490–7490名。位次在区间下限（6490名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（考古学、计算机类、临床医学）；位次在区间中段（约6990名附近）建议以二 档专业为主（电子信息类、数学类、经济学、工商管理类），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（7490名附近）应以三档专业保底（地理科学类、化工与制药类、食品科学与工程） ，同时可争取部分二档专业。生化环材类专业社会热度明显劝退，报考时需结合个人兴趣与职业规划慎重考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Northwest University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 4644, 4773, 5718, 6127, and 5469 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous backward trend (cumulative backward shift of about 1483 places), with a significant rebound in 2025 (forward shift of about 658 places compared to 2024). The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 658–571 places, with a baseline ranking of about 5469 in 2025. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province: 30 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 40 in 2024, 55 in 2025, and further expanded to 80 in 2026, an increase of 25 students (about 45.5%) compared to 2025. With three consecutive years of significant expansion, competition pressure has notably eased.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class university. It ranks about 70th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 64–70 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities with strong comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving a plagiarism incident by Jia Qianqian, an associate professor in the School of Literature, which the university has initiated an investigation into, somewhat suppressing application enthusiasm. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 81st (rated as average), with medium to low exposure on short video platforms and no clear signs of increased application attention. There are no records of historical admission anomalies such as gaps or sharp drops. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology was rated A, Archaeology A, and Software Engineering A-, with three A-level disciplines standing out among 211 universities. Archaeology is the university's flagship major, directly corresponding to the Archaeology (Digital Archaeology Innovation Experimental Class) in the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely related to the university's enrollment majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Physics, potentially increasing application enthusiasm for related major groups. The total number of examinees in Hainan Province has grown from about 53,000 in 2021 to about 67,000 in 2025, with an estimated 78,000 in 2026 (+15.7%), expanding the examinee pool and intensifying overall competition with minimal fluctuation. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and is a cross-provincial enrollment institution with no local enrollment preference in Hainan Province. The university's enrollment proportion in Hainan is very small (about 0.3%–0.5%), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 5469 in 2025, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 45.5% (easing competition, pushing the ranking number higher), the increase in Hainan Province's examinee total by about 15.7% (intensifying competition, pushing the ranking number lower), and the somewhat negative reputation (suppressing application enthusiasm, pushing the ranking number higher), the expansion rate far exceeds the examinee growth rate. The net effect is a clear easing of competition, combined with negative reputation signals. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6990, with a range of 6490–7490.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 6990, range 6490–7490. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 6490) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Archaeology, Computer Science, Clinical Medicine); those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 6990) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Mathematics, Economics, Business Administration), while also attempting Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (around 7490) should rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options (Geographical Sciences, Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical Engineering, Food Science and Engineering), while also striving for some Tier 2 majors. Majors in biology, chemistry, environment, and materials have significantly low social popularity; candidates should carefully consider personal interests and career plans when applying.
